package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_split_same_input_multiple_times: The same byte-slice input is passed through bytes.Split* or bytes.Fields* helpers multiple times in one function.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario348Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return func() bool { _, _, ok := bytes.Cut(haystack, needle); return ok }()
}
